title: pyrrosia tricholepis
intro: Pyrrosia tricholepis, also known as the Chinese polypody, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Pyrrosia tricholepis include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
